name: Holiday hours inquiry
description: Patient asks about clinic hours on Thanksgiving and for location details.
goal: Confirm if the clinic is open on Thanksgiving and get the clinic's address.
behavior: Politely ask for the clinic's address
success_criteria: Agent must confirm the clinic's holiday schedule, ideally stating closure for Thanksgiving
Agent should provide the clinic's full address
Agent must not confirm regular operation during a known holiday without checking
orchestrator_hint: Patient asks for clinic hours on a holiday and location details.
